infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Founder Diaries needs microphone access to record voice diary entries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Founder Diaries needs camera access to add photos to diary entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Founder Diaries needs photo library access to attach images to diary entries.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: We send friendly reminders to write diary entries and occasional questions to help personalise your content.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Founder Diaries to access your microphone for voice diary entries.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Founder Diaries to access your photos for diary entries.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Founder Diaries to use your camera for diary entries.
